name: Refrigerator Rhubarb Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rhubarb into half-inch pieces. Place in a stainless steel kettle or pan. Combine the sugar with rhubarb and let stand, covered, overnight.
2. Add one-quarter cup water to mixture. Bring to a boil, then simmer until cooked for 12 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in one 3-ounce package of strawberry gelatin. Stir until completely dissolved.
4. Pour into containers with tight-fitting lids. Store in refrigerator or divide into small portions and freeze.
Yield: about 1-1/4 quarts.
